title: jasminum didymum subsp. lineare
intro: Jasminum didymum subsp. lineare, also known as the 'linear jasmine' or 'twining jasmine', is a plant species belonging to the family Oleaceae, characterized by its twining stems and fragrant, star-shaped flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with its leaves and roots showing antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Jasminum didymum subsp. lineare include its potential to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality due to its calming effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
